parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { httpStatus: 202, responseBody: { success: true, accepted: true, decision: 'queued_for_review', action: $json.action, sourceType: $json.sourceType, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt }, auditRecord: { accepted: true, decision: 'queued_for_review', action: $json.action, sourceType: $json.sourceType, title: $json.title, url: $json.url, confidence: $json.confidence, environment: $json.environment, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt, rawPayload: $json.rawPayload } } }];

return [{ json: { httpStatus: $json.httpStatus ?? 400, responseBody: { success: false, accepted: false, error: $json.error ?? 'invalid_request', action: $json.action ?? null, sourceType: $json.sourceType ?? null, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt ?? new Date().toISOString() } } }];
